recent_news.title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: UK defense spending — or lack thereof — haunts Starmer's government
recent_news.summary: U.K. defense spending has fallen for years but concerns are growing over the threat posed to the country in increasingly uncertain times.
recent_news.body_text:
This report is from this week's CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter. Like what you see? You can subscribe here.
Speeches from 80-year old politicians who last served in government more than a quarter of a century ago seldom have an impact.

general_news.title: Robert Skidelsky, economic historian, 1939-2026 - Financial Times
The man who became one of India's greatest stage queens
general_news.summary: Chapal Bhaduri was Bengal’s biggest stage queen - until women arrived and the spotlight moved on.
